const geminiRaw = $input.first().json; const prevData = $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json; const rawContent = geminiRaw?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? null; const rawReasoning = geminiRaw?.choices?.[0]?.message?.reasoning ?? ''; const rawText = (rawContent && rawContent.trim().length > 50) ? rawContent : rawReasoning; const aiText = rawText .replace(/[\s\S]*?/gi, '') .replace(/^(Let me|I need|We need|First,|Now,|Let's|Okay,|Alright,|Looking at|I'll|I will|I should|So I|To output|Must |Section \d|Count:|That's \d|Total \d|We need to|I'm going|Going to|Need to|Let me think|Thinking|Draft|Output|Words:|Let me draft|Here's my|Craft:|So the|Let me now|Now I|Now let|So for|For section|Now section|Candidates:|Let's pick|Pick:|Choose:|Must be|Must pick|Must match|Must output|Must include|Must use|Must speak|Must write|Must have|Must give|Must recommend|Must mention|Must say|Must avoid|Must not|Must never|Rules:|Rule:|Format:|Note:|Notes:|Eg |E.g|Example:|Examples:|Let me craft|So section|So we need|Second line|First line|Two lines|Both lines|Each line|Line \d|Next section|Previous section).*$/gim, '') .replace(/ {3,}/g, ' ') .trim(); const d = prevData; const reportDate = d.report_date ? d.report_date.toString().substring(0, 10) : 'N/A'; const sleepQualityMap = { 1: 'Excellent', 2: 'Good', 3: 'Fair', 4: 'Poor', 5: 'Very Poor' }; const sleepQualityLabel = d.sleep_quality ? (sleepQualityMap[d.sleep_quality] ?? d.sleep_quality) : '—'; const todayObj = new Date(); const todayStr = todayObj.toISOString().split('T')[0]; const dayNames = ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday']; const todayName = dayNames[todayObj.getDay()]; const workoutSplit = { Monday: 'Chest & Triceps', Tuesday: 'Back & Biceps', Wednesday: 'Shoulders', Thursday: 'Legs', Friday: 'Full Upper Body', Saturday: 'Legs + Shoulders + HIIT', Sunday: 'Morning Run' }; const todaySession = workoutSplit[todayName] || 'Rest'; const stepsColor = d.steps >= 8000 ? '#22c55e' : d.steps >= 5000 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'; const hrvColor = d.hrv_avg >= 60 ? '#22c55e' : d.hrv_avg >= 40 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'; const sleepColor = d.sleep_score >= 80 ? '#22c55e' : d.sleep_score >= 60 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444'; const stepsGoalPct = d.steps ? Math.min(Math.round((d.steps / 9000) * 100), 100) : 0; const aiSections = aiText .split(' ') .filter(l => l.trim()) .map(line => { const trimmed = line.trim(); const isHeader = /^[1-9]\.\s+[^\w]/.test(trimmed) || /^[\u{1f300}-\u{1f9ff}]/.test(trimmed); if (isHeader) { return `
${trimmed}
`; } if (trimmed.startsWith('🎥')) { return `
${trimmed}
`; } if (trimmed.startsWith('•') || trimmed.startsWith('-')) { return `
${trimmed}
`; } return `
${trimmed}
`; }).join(''); const htmlEmail = `
🏋️

Kunal's Daily Health Brief

${reportDate} · Amazfit Helio → AI Coach

Today's session — ${todayName} 💪 ${todaySession}
Yesterday's biometrics
Steps
${d.steps?.toLocaleString() ?? '—'}
goal: 9,000
Calories
${d.calories ?? '—'}
kcal burned
Resting HR
${d.resting_hr ?? '—'}
bpm
HRV
${d.hrv_avg ?? '—'}
ms rmssd
Sleep
${d.sleep_hours ?? '—'}
hours
Sleep score
${d.sleep_score ?? '—'}
/ 100
Workout HR
${d.workout_avg_hr ?? '—'}
avg bpm
Weight
${d.weight ?? '—'}
kg
Sessions
${d.workout_count ?? 0}
workouts
Steps progress toward 9,000 goal ${stepsGoalPct}%
${d.workout_names && d.workout_names !== 'Rest day' ? `
Yesterday's workouts
🏋️ ${d.workout_names}
` : ''}
AI coach brief — ${todayName}, ${todayStr}
${aiSections}

Amazfit Helio → Zepp → Intervals.icu → n8n → AI → You

Hosted on Railway · Built for Kunal's June muscle-building goals

`; const safeTelegramAi = aiText .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1') .replace(/_(.*?)_/g, '$1') .replace(/\[(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/g, '$1 → $2') .replace(/#{1,6}\s/g, '') .replace(/[*_`]/g, '') .trim(); const telegramMsg = `💪 *Kunal's Health Brief — ${reportDate}* 📅 Today: *${todayName}* → ${todaySession} *Yesterday's Numbers* 👟 Steps: ${d.steps?.toLocaleString() ?? 'N/A'} ${d.steps >= 8000 ? '✅' : d.steps >= 5000 ? '⚠️' : '❌'} _(goal: 9,000)_ 🔥 Calories: ${d.calories ?? 'N/A'} kcal ❤️ Resting HR: ${d.resting_hr ?? 'N/A'} bpm 🧠 HRV: ${d.hrv_avg ?? 'N/A'} ms ${d.hrv_avg >= 60 ? '✅' : d.hrv_avg >= 40 ? '⚠️' : '❌'} 💤 Sleep: ${d.sleep_hours ?? 'N/A'}h · Score: ${d.sleep_score ?? 'N/A'}/100 · ${sleepQualityLabel} 🏋️ Workouts: ${d.workout_count ?? 0} session(s)${d.workout_names && d.workout_names !== 'Rest day' ? ` — ${d.workout_names}` : ''} ⚖️ Weight: ${d.weight ?? 'N/A'} kg ───────────────── 🤖 AI Coach ${safeTelegramAi} ───────────────── _Amazfit Helio → n8n → AI Coach_`; return [{ json: { htmlEmail, whatsappMsg: telegramMsg, report_date: reportDate } }];

name: Format Email + WhatsApp Message
notes: Extracts AI text from OpenRouter response (choices[0].message.content). Filters reasoning tokens. Builds HTML email with color-coded metrics grid, steps progress bar, workouts banner, AI coach brief. Builds Telegram message with Markdown.
